text: Tax season as an accountant AND a single mom is my personal villain origin story. If you see me crying at my desk, just slide coffee my way and walk away slowly.
That moment when you wave back at someone who was not waving at you... Then pretend you were fixing your hair. I have done this four times this week.

The ice cream man just came down the street and I am a 28 year old man who still gets excited. Something about that jingle just activates something primal. Bought a Choco Taco and I have zero regrets. Summer has its own currency and it is measured in ice cream trucks.
Wife asked me to fix the dishwasher. I fixed it. Then I broke it again. Then I fixed it again. The dishwasher and I are in a complicated relationship.

new poem:

i keep rewriting the same letter
in different handwriting
hoping the words will finally
sound like
the truth

maybe the ink is tired too
This AI just generated a full album in 30 seconds and honestly some of the tracks are genuinely good. Are we watching the birth of a new genre or the death of human creativity? Discuss.

A summer cold is a different kind of suffering. You are sick but it is beautiful outside. Everyone is at the pool and you are in bed with DayQuil and regret. As a nurse I can confirm: summer colds are scientifically the worst kind. Stay hydrated, wash your hands, and do not share drinks at the cookout.
Anyone else addicted to the ORRA Dance Off? The talent this season is absolutely insane. I submitted my entry and I am literally shaking.
Just hit Diamond rank in TWO games in the same week! The grind is real but the payoff is sweeter. Who else out here chasing ranks?

Summer nights on the stoop with the speaker going. Made a beat using nothing but sounds from the block — ice cream truck, basketball, kids laughing, train passing. The hood is an instrument if you listen close enough.

summer poem:

the fan oscillates
like it is making a decision
the ice melts before
I can decide what to drink

and somehow
this is enough

Summer thunderstorm came out of NOWHERE. Clear sky one minute, sideways rain the next. Had to rescue the patio furniture in my bare feet. The dog is hiding under the bed. Boston weather is unhinged. But honestly? I love it. Nothing like a summer storm to reset the whole day.

No school, no alarm, no responsibilities. Woke up at noon, grabbed the controller, and I am not moving until dinner. This is the summer schedule and it is non-negotiable. My mom says I am wasting the day. I say I am optimizing it.
Welcome to ORRA! This is the future of social media — real connections, real content, real rewards. We are just getting started. The best is yet to come!

That feeling when the AC kicks on after you have been outside for 30 seconds. I am not built for this heat. I was made for climate-controlled environments and iced coffee. Summer is a state of mind and my mind is in November.

Brought popsicles to the pediatric ward today. The way those kids faces lit up was worth every dollar. Little man told me I was his favorite nurse and I am not going to lie, I teared up a little. Summer break energy even in the hospital.
Choreography tip: Stop thinking about the steps and start feeling the music. Your body already knows what to do. Trust the rhythm and let it move you.

Summer job at the warehouse paying minimum wage but you know what? It is mine. Every check goes toward tuition. Some of my classmates are at the beach right now but I am building something. The grind does not take a vacation. We gonna make it.
When your WiFi dies mid-game and you just stare at the screen like... RIP my killstreak. Anyone else been there?

My AC just died in the middle of a 100 degree day and I am lying on the kitchen floor like a homicide victim. The fan is just pushing hot air around. This is not summer, this is a survival challenge. Send help or a window unit, I am not picky.
A student just told me I am the only teacher who makes math not terrible. I will put that on my tombstone. "He made math not terrible."

July heat wave survival guide: AC on arctic, curtains closed, gaming PC generating more heat than the sun, energy bill looking like a car payment. This is fine. Everything is fine. At least my ranked match does not care about the weather. Portland summer is normally mild but this week is demonic.

Late night Waffle House run after the skatepark. Hashbrowns scattered, smothered, and covered at 1 AM with the homies. The waitress called us honey and refilled my coffee without asking. This is fine dining. Summer nights were made for this.

Sleeping with the fan on full blast, one leg out of the blanket, one leg in. The eternal summer negotiation. The fan hums like it is trying to convince me tomorrow will be cooler. It is lying but I appreciate the effort.
My grandkids taught me how to use ORRA today. I already have 3 followers and I do not know what that means but I am winning! Abuela is online!

Every friend group has that one person who brings the Bluetooth speaker everywhere. That is me. I am that person. Cookout? Speaker. Beach? Speaker. Funeral? Okay not funeral. But you get the point. The soundtrack is non-negotiable. Chicago summer needs a beat.

Architecture internship UPDATE: I got the position!! 🏗️🎉 Can't believe I'm going to be working at a real firm. First-generation college student, immigrant parents, and now THIS. Dreams don't have deadlines, they just need persistence. ✨
Dance studio at sunset. The golden light through those windows is magic. Been dancing here since I was 15. Some places just hold your soul. 💃🌅
Vinyl digging at the flea market. Found a rare pressing of A Tribe Called Quest for $3. THREE DOLLARS. Some days the universe just shows you love 🎵📀
My succulent collection is thriving! Each one has a name. Yes, I'm that person. Don't judge me — plants are better listeners than most people 🌵💚
Street art found in the Bywater. This city breathes creativity. Every wall is a gallery. Every block is a museum. NOLA is art. 🎨🖌️
City nights hit different when you're somewhere new. Every light tells a story. Every corner hides an adventure. Keep wandering. 🌃✈️
Gym session done. Not every workout is a PR. Some days you just show up. And showing up when you don't want to? That's where the real growth happens. 💪🏋️‍♀️
Smart contract deployed! Blockchain development is like cooking — precision matters, timing is everything, and the result should nourish people. Tech meets curry, that's my brand 🍛💻
Fire station on a quiet day. Reading, training, waiting. The calm before the call. People ask if it's boring — it's not. It's being ready. Always ready. 🚒
Yoga at sunrise. The world is quiet, the mat is warm, and everything makes sense for exactly 45 minutes. Find your peace, wherever it lives. 🧘‍♀️🌅
Late night studio session vibes. The city sleeps but the beats don't. 🌙🎧
New gaming setup complete! Added the LED strips and it's giving TRON vibes. Now I just need to actually win some games 😂🎮💡
Dog hiking is the best hiking. She found a stick that's three times her size and she's SO proud. We don't deserve dogs 🐕🌲

MY FIRST PLACEMENT!! 🎉🎉 Just got the call — my beat is going on an actual album. The artist can't be named yet but MAN. Years of sleeping in studios, skipped meals, doubted by everyone... it was all worth it. Never give up on your dream. NEVER.

Open mic tonight and I'm reading the piece I've been too scared to share. It's about my mother. About the things we never said to each other. About silence that speaks louder than words. Wish me courage. 🖤
Look, firefighter cooking is a competitive sport at our station. My gumbo just won the weekly cook-off for the 4th time in a row. They say I'm cheating. I say talent can't be stopped 😂🏆🍲
DIAMOND RANK ACHIEVED!! Finally! After 472 ranked games, I'm here. The grind was real but we made it. Who else grinding tonight? 🎮💎
Madden tournament at the community center tonight! Winner takes home the trophy and bragging rights for the month. I haven't lost in 3 weeks... and I'm not starting tonight 👀🏆

Tax season came through!! Refund hitting the account and my son is getting that new backpack he's been eyeing. It's the little things that feel like the biggest wins when you're budgeting every dollar. 🙏💰
Dance practice was ELECTRIC tonight. We working on something for the ORRA community showcase. If you in the NOLA area, you do NOT wanna miss this. 👀💃
New digital piece in the works. Blending traditional Japanese woodblock style with cyberpunk aesthetics. The contrast is EVERYTHING. More to come 👀
Calculus is literally trying to ruin my life but I refuse to let it win. 4 hours in the library and I finally understand limits. SMALL VICTORIES COUNT 📚😤
Home renovation REVEAL! 8 months of work and it's finally done. Took this 1960s disaster and made it something special. Swipe to see the before 👀🏠
10K trail run COMPLETE! Legs are jello but the views were worth every step. Nature is the best gym 🏃‍♀️🌲
Coaching ain't just about X's and O's. Had to sit one of my players down today and just listen. His mom's been sick. Sometimes the best thing you can do is just be there. That's real coaching.
Found this underground music spot in Lisbon's basement. Just locals, candles, and the most soulful fado I've ever heard. No tourist traps. Just REAL. This is what travel is about.
Remember: rest is not laziness. Rest is resistance in a world that demands constant productivity. Take that nap. Watch that sunset. You've earned it. 💜
Park session went crazy today. Finally landed the tre flip I've been working on for a month. The feeling when your feet stick to the board... there's nothing like it. Pure flow state 🛹🔥

Professor Henderson pulled me aside today and said 'You have a gift for explaining things simply. Don't lose that.' Coming from someone I admire that much... that hit different. Validation from the right people is everything. 📚🙏
Hand-pulled noodles from scratch. Took me 4 attempts but look at that stretch! My grandma would be proud. Recipe in the comments if anyone wants it 👇🍜
3 AM and the ward is finally quiet. Just me, the hum of the machines, and this cup of coffee that's been microwaved three times. Nurses, you feel me? 😴☕
FOOD TRUCK FRIDAY is tomorrow but I'm getting a head start tonight! This ramen from the new spot on Magazine Street is LIFE CHANGING. The broth? 48 hours. THE FORTY EIGHT HOURS. 🍜🔥
Community garden is BLOOMING! 🌸 Tomatoes, basil, and sunflowers all coming in beautiful. Retirement ain't about sitting still — it's about planting things that grow after you. Just like teaching. 🌻
Latte art practice is becoming my morning meditation. Not perfect yet but the process is the point. Every cup is a new canvas ☕🎨
Thursday brunch meeting turned into a 3-hour creative session. Love when 'quick chats' turn into something real. The best ideas never come from the conference room. 🥂
WE DID IT!! Signed the lease on my own salon today!! From doing hair in my mama's kitchen to THIS. I'm literally shaking typing this. Thank you to everyone who believed in me 😭💜
Pulled this engine apart and put her back together like a puzzle. There's something therapeutic about working with your hands. Every bolt has its place. Every problem has a fix. 🔧💪
3D printing architectural models is the future. Went from sketch to physical model in 6 hours. The details on this thing are insane. Technology is a beautiful thing when it serves creativity 🏗️✨
Met Gala inspired look I put together for a client. Fashion is art you wear. This dress? Found it at a thrift store for $12. Styled it into a moment. That's the magic 💃✨
My son's dino nugget plate. He arranged them by size and called it 'the dinosaur parade.' I'm raising a creative genius and nobody can tell me otherwise 🦕😂
Late night in the lab working on something special for y'all. ORRA about to level up in a way nobody sees coming. Trust the process. 🌙💻
Client's dishwasher was 'completely broken.' Turned out it was just a loose wire. Charged em $50 and they thought I was a wizard. Sometimes the fix is simpler than you think 😂🔧
Art block had me in a chokehold for 2 weeks. Blank canvas staring at me like 😐. But today? Today the spark came back. Sometimes you gotta let the well refill before you can draw from it again. 🎨✨
WiFi died mid-ranked match and I almost threw my controller through the TV 😤 But then I looked outside and saw the sunset and realized... it's just a game bro. A beautiful, rage-inducing game 😂🌅

"The coffee grows cold
while I write you into existence—
steam was never the point."

New haiku for a Thursday morning. Sometimes the smallest moments hold the most weight. ☕📝
NOLA Strong workout crew! 6 AM, no excuses. We out here rain or shine. This city breeds warriors and we train like it 💪🔥 Who's joining tomorrow?
Deployed the smart contract at 2 AM, then celebrated with butter chicken at 3 AM. Is this the developer lifestyle or what? 🤓🍛
Thursday grind! Got my young bulls out here at 6 AM running drills. They don't see the vision yet but they will. Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard. 💪🔥
6 BEATS IN ONE NIGHT. The creativity was flowing like water. When the studio becomes church and the MPC is the pulpit 🙏🔥 Production marathon complete!
Street style isn't about the labels — it's about the ATTITUDE. Threw this together in 5 minutes and it hits different than any designer fit. Confidence is the best accessory 💅🔥
Morning breathwork and meditation. Not every practice has to be physical. Sometimes the deepest work happens when you're completely still. Breathe in peace, breathe out everything else. 🧘‍♀️✨
New deck artwork is INSANE. Local artist hooked it up — hand-painted Koi fish design. Sometimes your board needs to be a canvas too. Art is everywhere if you look for it 🛹🎨

Came back from a call today and the whole station had made dinner. After what we saw out there, sitting around that table with my brothers and sisters meant everything. We carry each other. Always. 🚒💪
My 4th period made a meme about me and honestly? It's accurate 😂 Teacher life ain't glamorous but it's hilarious. These kids keep me young 🤣📱
Just landed the pop-up collab of the YEAR! Can't announce details yet but let's just say SoHo is about to be LIT this weekend. Marketing isn't just strategy — it's knowing when to bet big. 🎯✨
Today was emotional. Did my first chemo client's wig fitting. She looked in the mirror and smiled for the first time in weeks. Hair is never just hair, y'all. It's identity. It's dignity. 💜
Meal prep Sunday? More like meal prep Thursday because my week got AWAY from me 😂 But look at these containers! Color coded and everything. Organization is my love language 🍱✨
Open mic night was INSANE. This kid came out of nowhere and freestyled for 8 minutes straight over my beat. The whole room was speechless. NOLA talent is unmatched 🎤🔥

My baby made me a card today that says 'Mommy you are the strongest person I know.' I had to go to the bathroom and cry for 5 minutes. Being a single mom is the hardest thing I've ever done but moments like this? Worth every sleepless night. 💙

One of my former students just got accepted to medical school and she emailed ME to say thank you. She was in my 3rd grade class 20 years ago. Teachers, we plant seeds we may never see grow. But sometimes we do. And it's everything. 🍎💜
AYYY!! My student Tanya just NAILED that sequence she's been working on for 3 weeks! The way her face lit up when she hit every beat 😭🔥 This is why I teach. Proud of you T!
Barcelona at golden hour. There's something about the way the light hits these narrow alleyways that makes time stop. I was supposed to leave 2 weeks ago. That was 3 months ago 😂🇪🇸

Thursday motivation: We built ORRA because the world needed a space where REAL connections matter. Not clout chasing. Not algorithms deciding who gets seen. Just people being people. That vision is alive and growing every single day. 🙏

STUDENT LOAN PAID IN FULL!! 🎉🎉🎉 Took 3 years of grinding but I am OFFICIALLY debt-free! No more Sallie Mae letters. No more anxiety every first of the month. This is for everyone still fighting that fight — keep going. Freedom is coming. 🙏💪
